title: neohenrya
intro: Neohenrya is a genus of plants in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the Garcinia family, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its fruit, which is rich in Garcinol, a compound believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neohenrya include its ability to aid in weight loss, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for digestive issues and metabolic disorders. Neohenrya can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tea, and extracts, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
